query: Latest posts on X about UAE investment and development cooperation with Egypt, prioritizing verified government, journalist and think-tank accounts

data.answer:
Here are the latest relevant X posts surfaced, ordered newest first and prioritizing government-affiliated and established news accounts. Exact verification badges, timestamps, and engagement figures were not available.

1. **Dr. Bu Abdullah — UAE government-affiliated account**  
   Emphasizes the UAE–Egypt strategic partnership, economic cooperation, regional stability, and shared prosperity. Posted approximately **July 12, 2026**.  
   https://x.com/Dr_BuAbdullah/status/2076548955010138115

2. **Arab Times — news account citing WAM**  
   Reports efforts involving **Dana Gas** to increase Egyptian oil and gas production, attract investment, and deepen UAE–Egypt energy cooperation. Posted **July 1, 2026**.  
   https://x.com/arabtimesnews/status/2072219708821234165

3. **Addis Standard — news account**  
   Reports that Egyptian and Emirati companies signed a strategic partnership exceeding **$3.1 billion** for a New Cairo development. Posted **June 22, 2026**.  
   https://x.com/addisstandard/status/2068949919553978422

4. **The National — established UAE news outlet**  
   Covers Majid Al Futtaim’s **$3.1 billion** mixed-use urban-development partnership with Midar in New Cairo’s Mada City. The agreement was witnessed by Egypt’s prime minister and ministers. Posted around **June 21, 2026**.  
   https://x.com/TheNationalNews/status/2068720068536537308

5. **CGTN Africa — established news account**  
   Reports the Egypt–UAE partnership to develop a New Cairo urban project with investment exceeding **$3 billion**. Posted around **June 21, 2026**.  
   https://x.com/cgtnafrica/status/2068675791819362722

**Most recent clearly official economic-policy post surfaced:**

- **Thani Al Zeyoudi — UAE Minister of State for Foreign Trade**  
  Describes Egypt as a vital UAE partner in non-oil trade and a high-impact investment destination. Posted **December 29, 2025**.  
  https://x.com/ThaniAlZeyoudi/status/2005692644157194299

The dominant recent themes are the **$3.1 billion New Cairo project**, expanded **energy-sector investment**, and broader strategic economic cooperation. No recent posts from identified think-tank accounts or additional Egyptian ministry, embassy, sovereign-fund, or head-of-state accounts were surfaced.
